MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-22-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly for hearing this day. Commissioner: Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Janet Pond. Arnold W. Evje. Esq. represented the Plaintiff, Vincent Kircher, and Defendant, Vincent Kircher appeared in pro per. Also present, plaintiff's agent. Bruce Sandifer. The case settled per stipulation of the parties which is read into the record. Trial date is vacated.
